name: Minted Orange Salade
recipeIngredient: 1 large Red or yellow pepper cut into small cubes (if using red oranges, use yellow pepper; if using yellow oranges, use red peppers)
1/4 tsp Salt or fresh squeezed lemon juice
Leaf lettuce or mix with another lettuce to add color and texture
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the oranges into small pieces.
2. Cube the red or yellow pepper (use yellow pepper if using blood red oranges, and red peppers if using yellow oranges).
3. Snip the fresh mint leaves.
4. Mix the mint with the orange segments in a bowl.
5. Add salt or lemon juice to taste.
6. Toss in the leaf lettuce or mix with another lettuce for color and texture.
7. Pour over the finished salad and serve.
